title: BLOOD-LINE
description:
Blood-Line is a full-stack web application designed to streamline blood donation and request workflows by connecting donors and recipients in real time.

The platform implements a dual-dashboard system:

Receiver Dashboard enables users to create and manage urgent blood requests with live status tracking.
Donor Dashboard allows registered donors to discover nearby requests and respond efficiently.

Core system features include:

Secure user authentication and profile management
Real-time blood request creation and updates using Firestore
Structured data modeling for donors, receivers, and request lifecycle
Payment gateway integration (Razorpay test mode) to simulate transaction flows
Responsive UI optimized for accessibility and clarity

The project emphasizes real-world usability, focusing on reducing friction in emergency scenarios while maintaining scalable architecture and clean UI design.
